fields.name: Financial Report Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the financial report.

fields.name: Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code of the layout.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies a description of the Excel Layout to help users understand what the layout does.

fields.name: File Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the file name of the layout when exported. If not specified the financial report name will be used instead.
